title: Zocular
description: Zocular gives you a smooth zoom, a film-style cinematic camera, and a full freecam - all in one client-side mod, configurable in-game.
body:
# Zocular

A zoom and **cinematic camera** mod for Minecraft, developed by **Bhored**.

Zocular gives you a smooth zoom, a film-style cinematic camera, and a full freecam - all in one client-side mod, configurable in-game.

## ✨ Features

### 🔍 Zoom
- Smooth, eased zoom with hold-to-zoom (first person) and toggle (third person).
- Zoom in/out keys and scroll-wheel zooming.
- Reduced look sensitivity while zoomed for steady aiming.
- *(Prefer another zoom mod like OkZoomer? Turn the built-in zoom off in the config and keep just the cinematic camera.)*

### 🎬 Cinematic Camera (press **O**)
- **Smooth zoom-out** to a wide, far third-person view - like a cinematic chase cam.
- **Letterbox bars** that slide in/out with a smooth transition.
- **Locked camera**: holds still so you ride across a fixed frame, then smoothly pans to re-center you when you reach the screen edge.
- **Re-frame when hidden**: the camera moves to find you again if you slip behind terrain.
- **Auto-Orbit**: slowly arc the camera around yourself.
- **Scenic Cut** (press **X**): instantly cut to a fresh random angle.
- **Vignette**: optional edge darkening (Subtle / Medium / Heavy).
- **Shader control**: automatically turn your Iris shaders on (or off) in cinematic view, restored on exit.
- **HUD hidden** (F1-style) for a clean shot - your player and name tag still show.
- Adjustable **turn speed**, pan duration, zoom-out distance, and more.

### 🎥 Freecam (press **K**)
- Detaches a real camera so the world loads and renders around it like spectator mode.
- Fly with **WASD**, **Space** (up), **Shift** (down); hold **Sprint** to go faster, or **Sprint + scroll** to fine-tune speed.
- **Strict** mode (collides with blocks) or **Noclip** mode (fly through walls) — toggle in the config.
- Your player freezes in place and stays visible with its name tag so you can frame yourself.

## ⌨️ Default Keybinds (all rebindable)
| Action | Key |
|---|---|
| Zoom | `Z` |
| Zoom In | `=` |
| Zoom Out | `-` |
| Cinematic Camera | `O` |
| Scenic Camera Cut | `X` |
| Freecam | `K` |

## ⚙️ Configuration
Everything is tweakable in **Mod Menu → Zocular → Configure**, or in `config/zocular.json5` (hot-reloads on save).

## 📦 Requirements
- Minecraft **26.1.2** (Fabric)
- **Fabric API**
- Java **25+**

## 🔌 Optional integrations
- **Mod Menu** — in-game settings screen
- **Iris** — automatic shader on/off in cinematic mode

## 🙏 Credits
- Based on **Zume** by **Nolij** (OSL-3.0).
- Cinematic/freecam features inspired by **OkZoomer** and the **Freecam** / **Fair Freecam** mods.

## 📄 License
